summary: Add store.FormatIDValue to render integral float64 IDs as plain integers; applied at the UpsertBatch and sync.go extractID ID-extraction sites.
reason: JSON-number IDs unmarshal to float64 and rendered in scientific notation (e.g. '3.093733e+06'), making campaign IDs unusable as input to other commands.
validated_outcome: Campaign IDs in health/dupes output render as plain integers and feed cleanly into other commands.
